description: Provides retrieval support for neural network architectures, PyTorch implementation, and training optimization.
prompt_addition: You now have deep learning expert augmentation. Prefer the deep learning knowledge base for papers, implementation background, and training experience. If the task also requires code generation, continue with the default code tools after grounding on retrieved results.

tool_definition.name: dl_expert_search
tool_definition.description: Search the deep learning knowledge base. Example arguments: {"query": "transformer training stability"}
